delphi_pit_top119.coverage_note: Delisted/renamed members included (SQ->XYZ resolved via resolve_ticker; TWTR-era members present). Dual-class listings retained per the blind rule (GOOG and GOOGL can both appear). Excludes ADRs, Canadian listings, preferreds, warrants, funds by TICKERS category; no other filter.
delphi_pit_top119.definition: Top 119 US common stocks (Sharadar TICKERS categories Domestic Common Stock / Primary Class / Secondary Class) by SHARADAR/DAILY marketcap at each of 21 quarter-end signal dates 2021-03-31..2026-03-31, per docs/lab_prereg_delphi_pit_universe.md run B.
delphi_pit_top119.source: Sharadar DAILY + TICKERS via Nasdaq Data Link, pulled 2026-07-04; built by run_delphi_pit.py

gauntlet_v1_universes.coverage_note: Median 3 names/date (max 16, 0.06%) had a DAILY marketcap but no SEP bar and are excluded. SMALL filled to exactly 1500 from ~2003 on; 1421-1500 in 2000-2002 when fewer names cleared the price/liquidity floors. Marketcap ranks 2001+ (true micro-caps) excluded by design. Delisted names included through their final trading day (Sharadar convention).
gauntlet_v1_universes.definition: Monthly point-in-time size-bucket universes per docs/lab_prereg_gauntlet_v1.md section 3: at each month-end signal date 1999-12..2025-11, names with Sharadar DAILY marketcap + SEP bar, unadjusted close >= $3, median 21d dollar volume >= $1M; LARGE = marketcap ranks 1-500, SMALL = ranks 501-2000. One row per (signal_date, window, bucket) with the full member list.
gauntlet_v1_universes.source: Sharadar SEP + DAILY via Nasdaq Data Link bulk exports pulled 2026-07-04 (entitled same day); built by run_gauntlet_screen.py / run_gauntlet_holdout.py
